name: fraud_scoring
description: a card-transaction fraud world: transactions get a risk score and holds; actions score, hold, release, block

card.description: a card-transaction fraud world: transactions get a risk score and holds; actions score, hold, release, block

rules: 'score' computes risk = amount//100 + merchant_risk + velocity*5, clamped to 0-100, and flags the transaction when score >= 50.
'hold' places a hold (status -> held) on a pending or released transaction whose card is not frozen, incrementing holds_placed.
'release' clears a hold (status held -> released), incrementing releases.
'block' is terminal: it freezes the card and stops the transaction (status -> blocked), incrementing blocks.
Actions are idempotent when their precondition is not met.
